task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the correct patient, Angelia Kuhic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient name 'Angelia Kuhic' (and optionally DOB 1965-05-17) is visible in the patient header, dashboard, or search results.

task_completion.description: Verify the Review of Systems (ROS) form is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form titled 'Review of Systems' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify Constitutional, Cardiovascular, and Respiratory systems are documented as Negative.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sections for Constitutional, Cardiovascular, and Respiratory are marked as 'Negative', 'Normal', or 'No', or contain text denying symptoms.

task_completion.description: Verify the Musculoskeletal system is documented with the specific positive finding.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Musculoskeletal section is marked 'Positive' or 'Abnormal' AND/OR contains text including keywords like 'knee', 'stiff', 'stiffness', or 'occasional'.

task_completion.description: Verify the form has been saved successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save' button is being clicked, a success message is displayed, or the ROS form appears in the list of completed forms for the encounter.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is using the OpenEMR web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the standard OpenEMR user interface (menus, frames, styling) rather than a raw database view or terminal.

integrity.description: Ensure data entry is performed through the form, not SQL/terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows, SQL consoles, or code editors are visible performing data insertion.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is interacting with the specific ROS form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Input fields in the Review of Systems form show active text entry or selection states.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Angelia Kuhic (DOB: 1965-05-17). The Review of Systems form must show: Constitutional=Negative, Cardiovascular=Negative, Respiratory=Negative. Musculoskeletal must be Positive or include text containing 'knee', 'stiff', or 'occasional'.
